ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shops" (
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shop */,
  "shop_name" TEXT /* Name of the shop */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the shop */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the shop is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the shop is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the shop is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the shop */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the shop */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the shop manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the item */,
  "item_description" TEXT /* Description of the item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the item (e.g., clothing, electronics) */,
  "item_price" REAL /* Price of the item */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the item */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the item */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the item */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the item */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_items_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "item_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each item type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the item type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the item type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the supplier is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the supplier is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the supplier is located */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shop where the sale was made */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item sold */,
  "item_cnt_day" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated by the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES shops ("shop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shop where the inventory is located */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item in inventory */,
  "min_quantity" INTEGER /* Minimum quantity of the item in inventory */,
  "max_quantity" INTEGER /* Maximum quantity of the item in inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES shops ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "low_stock_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shop where the alert was triggered */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item that triggered the alert */,
  "threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold quantity for the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was triggered */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Whether the alert has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_low_stock_alerts_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES shops ("shop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_low_stock_alerts_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shop where the trend is observed */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the item in the trend */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the trend */,
  "sales_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item sold during the trend */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_trends_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES shops ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue entry */,
  "shop_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shop that generated the revenue */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the revenue was generated */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Amount of revenue generated */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of sales made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_shop_id FOREIGN KEY ("shop_id") REFERENCES shops ("shop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales manager, inventory manager, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sales data */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sales data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale being reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reports_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory being reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_reports_inventory_id FOREIGN KEY ("inventory_id") REFERENCES inventory ("inventory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the revenue being reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_reports_revenue_id FOREIGN KEY ("revenue_id") REFERENCES revenue ("revenue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trend_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trend being reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trend_reports_trend_id FOREIGN KEY ("trend_id") REFERENCES sales_trends ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "low_stock_report" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* ID of the alert being reported */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_low_stock_report_alert_id FOREIGN KEY ("alert_id") REFERENCES low_stock_alerts ("alert_id")
)
